calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Oas For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on a name change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Yvonne Lee. Petitioner was sworn and examined through Spanish Interpreter, Anna Maria Reynoso. Court ordered petitioner's name changed to Maria Isabel Serran o Encarnacion. Decree signed,
